ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Random Forest, Neural Network) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to train the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used to train the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation instance */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluated model */,
  "evaluation_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the evaluation */,
  "learning_instances" INTEGER /* Number of learning instances used */,
  "evaluation_time" REAL /* Evaluation time in CPU seconds */,
  "model_cost" REAL /* Cost of the model in RAM-hours */,
  "classified_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances classified */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the evaluation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation instance */,
  "classification_correct" REAL /* Percentage of classifications correct */,
  "kappa_statistic" REAL /* Kappa statistic value */,
  "f1_score_class_0" REAL /* F1 score for class 0 */,
  "f1_score_class_1" REAL /* F1 score for class 1 */,
  "precision_class_0" REAL /* Precision for class 0 */,
  "precision_class_1" REAL /* Precision for class 1 */,
  "f1_score_macro" REAL /* Macro F1 score */,
  "f1_score_weighted" REAL /* Weighted F1 score */,
  "evaluation_time" REAL /* Time taken to compute metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recalls" (
  "recall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recall entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated metric */,
  "recall_class_0" REAL /* Recall percentage for class 0 */,
  "recall_class_1" REAL /* Recall percentage for class 1 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recalls_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gmeans" (
  "gmean_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GMean entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated metric */,
  "gmean_value" REAL /* GMean percentage value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gmean_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gmeans_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_instances" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being trained */,
  "training_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances used for training */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Information about the training data */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_instances_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "serialized_models" (
  "serialized_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each serialized model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "serialized_size" REAL /* Size of the serialized model in bytes */,
  "serialization_method" TEXT /* Method used to serialize the model */,
  "serialization_time" REAL /* Time taken to serialize the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("serialized_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_serialized_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or evaluation */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation summary */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "total_evaluations" INTEGER /* Total number of evaluations conducted */,
  "average_accuracy" REAL /* Average accuracy across evaluations */,
  "evaluation_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the evaluations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
